title: Looking for Teacher at Great Learning Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Looking for Teacher at Great Learning Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Teacher looking for your next big career move? Great Learning Digital Technologies in Vadodara offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Great Learning Digital Technologies:
Great Learning Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Great Learning Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
